title: API: POST /api/style-profiles (create custom + analyzedTone heuristic)

task.description: Add POST /api/style-profiles for custom creation. Validate sampleTexts length is 3–5 and each text is non-empty. Compute analyzedTone via an MVP heuristic that always returns a non-null object and persist JSON strings in DB.
acceptance_criteria: POST with sampleTexts length 3 returns 200 and response.styleProfile.sampleTexts.length===3.
Response includes styleProfile.analyzedTone where typeof is 'object' and value is not null.
POST with sampleTexts length 2 returns 400 with error.code==='VALIDATION_ERROR' and error.fields.sampleTexts as a non-empty string.
POST with sampleTexts length 6 returns 400 with error.fields.sampleTexts as a non-empty string.
Created style profile appears in subsequent GET /api/style-profiles under customs for the same user.

definition_of_done: POST handler enforces auth and ownership (isSystemPreset=0, userId=session user).
DB stores sample_texts_json and analyzed_tone_json as JSON strings.
